title: Ukrainian Poached Pears with Chewy German Chocolate
description: A traditional Ukrainian dessert with a German twist, using poached pears and chewy chocolate.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the water, sugar, and lemon juice. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Peel, core, and halve the pears. Add them to the saucepan and poach for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the pears from the saucepan and let them cool.
Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Dip each pear half into the melted chocolate, coating completely.
Place the chocolate-covered pears on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set the chocolate.
Just before serving, drizzle with heavy cream and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
